untranslatable_reason: Diamond pattern requires multi-bar geometric analysis: detection of widening phase (higher highs AND lower lows simultaneously), followed by narrowing phase (lower highs AND higher lows simultaneously), and visual trend line symmetry. This requires comparing highs/lows across multiple bars and geometric calculations beyond simple indicator thresholds. Approximated using volatility contraction (hvol_20 declining) as proxy for narrowing, and Donchian breakout for exit, but the core widening→narrowing sequence and diamond shape recognition cannot be expressed with available point-in-time indicators.
